verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You talk about people You talk about things That really aren't important at all You talk about weather, You talk about problems We have here at home and abroad But friend I'm excited about a solution for the world Oh I'm gonna shout and sing Jesus Christ is still the king of kings

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Get all excited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King, I said get all excited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King, Get all excited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King, Jesus Christ is still the King of kings
